name: omniswap
description: OmniSwap - Solana Token Swap API for Bots & AI Agents. Best prices via Jupiter. Swap any SPL token in 3 lines of code.

tools.name: omniswap_quote
tools.description: Get a swap quote for any Solana token pair. Returns best price route via Jupiter aggregator with 0.5% platform fee included.

input_token.description: Input token symbol (SOL, USDC, BONK, etc.) or mint address

output_token.description: Output token symbol or mint address

amount.description: Amount of input token to swap (in human-readable units, e.g. 1.5 SOL)

tools.name: omniswap_execute
tools.description: Execute a token swap on Solana. Requires wallet private key. Builds and sends the transaction.

input_token.description: Input token symbol or mint address

output_token.description: Output token symbol or mint address

tools.name: omniswap_price
tools.description: Get current price of any Solana token in USD.

token.description: Token symbol (SOL, USDC, BONK) or mint address

tools.name: omniswap_search
tools.description: Search for Solana tokens by name, symbol, or mint address.

auth.description: No API key required for quotes and prices. Wallet private key needed for swap execution only.

pricing.fee: 0.5% platform fee on each swap (50 basis points)
